"vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-248", "name": "Uncaught Exception"}], "description": "### Impact

A remote, unauthenticated denial-of-service vulnerability in `MerkleRadixTrie::put_chunk` allows any state-sync peer to crash any node performing state synchronization (freshly joining nodes and recovering nodes).

A malicious peer can respond to a `RequestChunk` with a `ResponseChunk::Chunk` whose first `TrieItem.key` is the empty (ROOT) key. The chunk passes sorting, range, and Merkle-proof validation, but when `put_raw` tries to store a value at the root node, it calls `TrieNode::put_value(...).unwrap()`, which returns `Err(RootCantHaveValue)` and panics, aborting the node process. The panic fires on the first malicious chunk the victim commits; no rate limit or authentication gate caps the attack.

Impacted: any node running state sync against untrusted peers — this includes fresh nodes performing initial download and existing nodes recovering from data loss. Honest nodes never construct ROOT-keyed items, so non-syncing operation is unaffected.

### Patches

See [PR](https://github.com/nimiq/core-rs-albatross/pull/3762).

### Workarounds

There is no safe in-process workaround: any peer serving state-sync data can trigger the crash and the code path is not guarded by a feature flag.

### Resources

- Fix commit: (link to the merged PR commit, once merged)
- Affected code: [`primitives/trie/src/trie.rs`](https://github.com/nimiq/core-rs-albatross/blob/albatross/primitives/trie/src/trie.rs) — `put_chunk` (around line 819) and `put_raw` (around line 351)", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00339, "percentile": 0.25559}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-mw3q-r9wh-h2ff", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-21T19:50:31Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-mw3q-r9wh-h2ff", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-mw3q-r9wh-h2ff"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-46545"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-06-10T00:16:54Z", "published_at": "2026-05-21T19:50:31Z", "references": ["https://github.com/nimiq/core-rs-albatross/security/advisories/GHSA-mw3q-r9wh-h2ff", "https://github.com/nimiq/core-rs-albatross/pull/3762", "https://github.com/nimiq/core-rs-albatross/commit/0fb8766adea91e038af00e635a6eb92756e50172", "https://github.com/nimiq/core-rs-albatross/releases/tag/v1.5.0", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-46545", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-mw3q-r9wh-h2ff"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/nimiq/core-rs-albatross/security-advisories/GHSA-mw3q-r9wh-h2ff", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/nimiq/core-rs-albatross", "summary": "nimiq-primitives: Panic DoS in trie chunk processing via ROOT-keyed item", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-10T13:41:42Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-mw3q-r9wh-h2ff", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.5.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "rust", "name": "nimiq-primitives"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 1.5.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: nimiq-primitives: Panic DoS in trie chunk processing via ROOT-keyed item
